articles.title: Family offices show stronger preference for Ethereum ETFs over Bitcoin
articles.description: Family offices and professional investors are allocating spot Ethereum (ETH) and Bitcoin (BTC) exchange-traded products (ETPs) differently, with family offices demonstrating a relatively stronger preference for Ethereum. According to data compiled by Bitwise as of Dec. 31, 2024, family offices and trusts allocate 0

articles.title: Trump Ethereum DeFi Project Gets Another Big Investment
articles.description: Dubai-based DWF Labs has purchased $25 million in WLFI, the native token of the Trump family-backed World Liberty Financial.

articles.title: Crypto Takes Off in Panama: City to Accept Bitcoin, Ethereum for Public Services
articles.description: Panama City has embraced a new system for paying public services with Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDC, and USDT, using local bank partnership.

articles.title: Bitcoin Eyes $93,500, But Key Resistance Could Drag Price To $80,500
articles.description: Bitcoin price is currently showing signs of recovery as it aims for the $93,500 level. However, traders remain cautious due to technical resistance that could potentially drive prices lower. According to analysis from Rekt Capital, BTC is consolidating within a triangular market structure developed by two critical exponential moving averages (EMAs)

articles.title: Ethereum Is What Bitcoin Was Meant to Be
articles.description: Bitcoin was born as a response to institutional failure, a decentralized escape hatch from corruptible centralized finance and a north star of self sovereignty. Bitcoin’s true vision was a peer-to-peer electronic cash system. That phrase is right there in the Bitcoin white paper’s title from Satoshi himself.You're reading Crypto Long & Short, our weekly newsletter featuring insights, news and analysis for the professional investor

articles.title: Charles Hoskinson hints at partnership between Cardano and XRP
articles.description: Ripple and Cardano are talking about RLUSD integration and possible ETFs – XRP and ADA are becoming more relevant. The article Charles Hoskinson hints at partnership between Cardano and XRP was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
